description: Robert Chang discusses his background in crypto, starting from the GME craze in early 2021, and his experiences in trading and working within the crypto space. He shares insights about the CTOM chat group and the upcoming Pump Fun token pre-sale on July 12th.
topic_summary: Robert Chang shares his journey into crypto, touching on his early experiences, the CTOM trading group, and the upcoming Pump Fun token pre-sale [t=192:83].
